children.text: basing price reasonableness determinations on actual cost and pricing data for purchases of the same or similar products for the Department of Defense; and
reducing the cost and pricing data to be submitted in accordance with this chapter.
That the program does not include any preferences for contract type or specific contract requirements.
That each Secretary of a military department has no unique reporting requirements to the Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment with respect to the program.
